achievements.title: Children of Historia
achievements.description: Attempting to defy fate, Stocke tried to save his subordinates.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Awakening
achievements.description: As wielder of the White Chronicle, Stocke was given a new power.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Beginning
achievements.description: History has split in two, between Standard and Alternate.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Top Secret Mission
achievements.description: Following Heiss' orders, Stocke detained a spy against Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Struggle with Bandits
achievements.description: Stocke defeats the Desert Pirates and learns how to use Explosives.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Breakthrough
achievements.description: In order to reach Granorg, Stocke defeats the enemies at the Sand Fortress.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Collecting Wood
achievements.description: With Aht's help, Stocke learned how to see small changes in mana.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Preparing a Meal
achievements.description: Stocke helped Aht to defeat a 'big piggy'.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Sister
achievements.description: As Aht's Prayer is finishing, Stocke ran to save a hooded figure.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The White Page
achievements.description: Stocke handed over a White Page and learned Mana Burst.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Escort
achievements.description: Stocke found a girl in Granorg Sewers and lead her to safety.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: High Alert
achievements.description: Security is too high at Granorg without a way to disappear..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Princess of Light
achievements.description: Stocke at last met with the Princess of Light, Eruca.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Will's Sword
achievements.description: Will survived Capital in Flames because of the Sand Sword Stocke gave.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Aht's Fight
achievements.description: Arriving at Granorg, Stocke came to Aht's rescue.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Black Page
achievements.description: Stocke handed over a Black Page and learned a stronger Mana Burst.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Something Precious
achievements.description: This time, Pierre found the strength to stay loyal to his friends.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Will to the Rescue
achievements.description: Armed with a Sand Sword, Will survived to help the Resistance.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Death of a Friend
achievements.description: Is there a way to convince Rosch not to fight?
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gladiator
achievements.description: Stocke agreed to fight Gladiator and won.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Search for Friends
achievements.description: Overcoming Chi, Stocke defeated Gadeff at Cygnus.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Desert City Messiah
achievements.description: With his friends freed, Stocke defended Cygnus from a Hell Spider.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Stocke Strikes
achievements.description: Stocke counters Hedge's plans to defect at Cygnus.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Secret Weapons
achievements.description: Stocke destroyed the first two ballistas deployed by Dias.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A New Journey
achievements.description: Stocke finally defeats Palomides the Executioner.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Overcoming the Trial
achievements.description: Defeating the Guardian Spider, Stocke gains the Beast Mark.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Beast Mark
achievements.description: Stocke turned in the Beast Mark to gain a new power.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Royal Throne
achievements.description: Chasing off Protea, Eruca assumes the throne as Queen.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Duel in the Dark
achievements.description: Stocke and co fought off Granorg guards in the mines.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Force Core
achievements.description: Sonja extracted the core from the mysterious gauntlet.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Reporting to Viola
achievements.description: Stocke and co defeated a mysterious Shadow and came to Sand Fortress.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Kiel's Talent
achievements.description: Kiel taught Sword Dancing to Stocke who learned STRIKE.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Ambush Tactics
achievements.description: Preventing the Sand Fortress being destroyed by bombs is a priority..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Sand Fortress Battle
achievements.description: Disarming the bombs, Stocke and co defended Sand Fortress from Granorg.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wolf in the Fold
achievements.description: Stocke obtained documents from Paelzan detailing an ambush attack.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Parting Ways
achievements.description: Stocke encounters a familiar enemy and learned VANISH.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Fiendish
achievements.description: Stocke and co flee from Alistel, and collapse from exhaustion.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Report From Vanoss
achievements.description: Stocke saves Vanoss from a Forest Bear attack.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Premonition of War
achievements.description: Stocke returns in time to defend Celestia from Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Lion's Awakening
achievements.description: Stocke and Rosch fight until Rosch comes to his senses.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Winds of War
achievements.description: Stocke fought off a Thaumachine for Celestia.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Beastkind Warrior
achievements.description: With Gafka's help, Stocke learned to fight with Chi.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gafka's Past
achievements.description: Stocke revealed to Gafka that he has a Beast Mark.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Gafka's Homeland
achievements.description: Stocke and co arrived safely at Forgia.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Skalla Liberated
achievements.description: Stocke and co successfully liberate the gutrals at Skalla.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Commander's Fall
achievements.description: Alistel is chased out of Sand Fortress after their Thaumaton is defeated.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Black Disciple
achievements.description: After rejecting a truce with Alistel, a mysterious figure attacked.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Viola's Last Stand
achievements.description: Viola tries to take responsibility for Alistel, and lets Stocke slay her.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: An End to Madness
achievements.description: With Historica restored, Stocke was able to stop Hugo.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Madness of Heiss
achievements.description: Stocke defeats Heiss, but he runs away to a different point in history..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Death in Black
achievements.description: Stocke defeated Executioner Palomides to release black energy.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Warlord in Black
achievements.description: Stocke defeated King Garland the Mighty to release black energy.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Monstrocity in Black
achievements.description: Stocke defeated the Holff Ruins spider guardian to release black energy.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Valkyrie in Black
achievements.description: Stocke defeated the last Guardian Viola to release black energy.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Into the Battlefield
achievements.description: Stocke defeated The Black Chronicle, but it was not over yet.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Promise
achievements.description: Stocke and his allies finally defeated Apocrypha at Historia.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Fallen Capital
achievements.description: Stocke ambushed the enemy at Alma Mine, but it was a waste of time.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Queen Ascendant
achievements.description: Stocke didn't wait for the agent, won the Alma Mine, but lost the war.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Sealed Path
achievements.description: Stocke had no tricks to perform, so tried to break into Granorg by force.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Princess' Charge
achievements.description: Stocke told the princess not to push herself, but that was a mistake..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Distorted Hope
achievements.description: Stocke revealed the secret to Conuts too early, and it was exploited.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Front of Despair
achievements.description: The Sand Fortress could not survive simply by Sending Reinforcements.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Knight's End
achievements.description: Unable to confess to Sonja, Rosch died friendless and alone.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Voice Unheard
achievements.description: Stocke gathered intel on Viola, but did not tell Cedric.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Fated Assassination
achievements.description: The decoy failed, yet the Princess was assassinated by someone else..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Chains of Hatred
achievements.description: War breaks out because Liese didn't marry a human.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Lion General
achievements.description: Rosch wasn't found, Stocke became a general, couldn't save the world.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Stray Lion
achievements.description: Let's be honest, letting Marco do anything with fire is a bad idea.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The World's Betrayal
achievements.description: Stocke couldn't save the world as an assassin working for Dias..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Assassination of Raul
achievements.description: Raul was nominated to lead Celestian forces, but was assassinated..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Fleeting Peace
achievements.description: By Stocke's reluctance, Aht was compelled to keep him safe forever and ever..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Aht's Sacrifice
achievements.description: Stocke allowed Aht to break Gadeff's Chi, but she died..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Eternal War
achievements.description: Granorg betrayed Celestia's agreements to side in war..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Mighty King's Death
achievements.description: Stocke stayed in Cygnus while Garland fought alone, and died.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Simmering Fury
achievements.description: Stocke captured Mimel. Marco killed everyone. The End.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Divine Judgement
achievements.description: Eruca and Stocke accepted a truce with Alistel, who then killed them.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Beast God's Reign
achievements.description: Turns out becoming an unstoppable Beast God is a BAD THING.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Oncoming Calamity
achievements.description: Stocke and Raynie lay down their swords as the world ends around them.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Premature Invasion
achievements.description: Stocke asked Bergas to lead the way into battle too early...
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Hugo the Omnipotent
achievements.description: Stocke accepted Hugo's offer for power, but it was too much for him to handle..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Night Watch
achievements.description: Stocke gave 2 Anti-Sleeps to a soldier in Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Soldier Recruit
achievements.description: Stocke enlisted 2 soldiers at an Inn by request of Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The King's Daughter
achievements.description: Stocke gives Eruca's own ring to a girl in Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: What Was Inherited
achievements.description: Stocke revealed the secret of Conuts at the right time..
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Accident in the Cave
achievements.description: Marco gets a Right-Cut Scroll for saving a man trapped in a cave.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Ultimate Dish
achievements.description: Eruca gains a Firelight Pact for helping a man serve the Ultimate Dish.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Marco the Calm
achievements.description: Marco learned all four move-scrolls in Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Raynie the Active
achievements.description: Raynie learned all four move-scrolls from Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Red-Letter Day
achievements.description: Rosch took Stocke's advice and pursued speaking with Sonja himself.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Flower of Promise
achievements.description: Stocke brought a flower bud from Celeste to a person in Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Letter to Tomorrow
achievements.description: Stocke gave Viola's personal diary to Cedric for his report.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Engineer Recruit
achievements.description: Stocke recruited an Engineer from Alma Mine to Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Mankind and Beastkind
achievements.description: Stocke brought Liese and a human into a happy relationship.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: One and Only
achievements.description: Aht receives Firestar Pact for helping an artist collaborate with himself.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Swordsman Recruit
achievements.description: Stocke makes a very late recruit to Alistel with Gadeff from Cygnus.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Mercenary Recruit
achievements.description: Stocke saves a mercenary from death to recruit him to Alistel.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Despairing Young Man
achievements.description: Marco gets a Left-Cut Scroll for helping a protestor come to his senses.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Assassination of Dias
achievements.description: Although unable to kill Dias, Stocke takes back a stolen sword to its owner.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Wandering Soul
achievements.description: Stocke helps Aht grow in her duty as a Shaman and reports it to Vanoss.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Second Opinion
achievements.description: Raynie gets a Slumbering Scroll for making a man take his medicine.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Battlefield Missive
achievements.description: Stocke earns Death Pact for comforting the child of a soldier.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Next Foe
achievements.description: Stocke took Gadeff's challenge to defeat the Crush Bear.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Road to Victory
achievements.description: Stocke completed the challenge of defeating the Mist Spider.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Conversion
achievements.description: Rosch was volunteered to install Impale, Blast, and Haste Cores.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: An Unwanted Reunion
achievements.description: Although saddened at the loss of Mimel, Marco doesn't genocide anyone.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Ultimate Skill
achievements.description: Gafka learned all four ultimate skills from books given to Bergas.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Beast God's Birth
achievements.description: Gafka receives Magic Fist Forza for not becoming a destructive demi god.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: When the Journey Ends..?
achievements.description: Raynie saw 3 events that influenced her Journey's End.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: At Journey's End
achievements.description: Stocke answered Marco's request to check on Raynie.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Moon Armlet
achievements.description: Stocke combed the desert and found Garland's lost armlet.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Good Thief's Way
achievements.description: Raynie gets a Piercing Scroll for helping the Desert Crows feel better.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Living Legend
achievements.description: Stocke turned in the requested items to Master Vainqueur.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Blades Trial
achievements.description: Stocke learns all four blade pacts from Vainqueur.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Starlit Trial
achievements.description: Aht learns all four starlit pacts from Vainqueur.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Light Trial
achievements.description: Eruca learns all four light pacts from Vainqueur.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: The Final Trial
achievements.description: Stocke defeats Master Vainqueur and gets an upgraded Historica.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: Thaumatech's End
achievements.description: Stocke gets a Blast Core for destroying a Thaumatec test subject.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Scholar's Creed
achievements.description: Stocke receives a Haste Core for encouraging Fennel in the past.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: A Timely Warning
achievements.description: Stocke warns a man in the past to prevent harm in the future.
achievements.author: MGNS8M

achievements.title: - HISTORIA -
achievements.description: Please, let us know the name of the soul to be remembered..
achievements.author: MGNS8M
